skills.name: Programming Language
skills.description: Languages used for scripting, automation, and building DevOps tools and workflows.
skills.notes: Common choices include Python, Bash, Go, and JavaScript. Focus on writing automation scripts, working with APIs, and handling system-level operations.

skills.name: Operating Systems (Linux/Unix)
skills.description: Understanding operating systems, especially Linux, which is widely used in servers and cloud environments.
skills.notes: Learn file systems, process management, permissions, package managers, and system configuration. Linux is essential for managing servers and containers.

skills.name: Terminal & Scripting
skills.description: Command-line skills and scripting for automating tasks and managing systems efficiently.
skills.notes: Includes Bash, PowerShell, text processing tools (grep, awk, sed), and automation scripts for deployment and maintenance tasks.

skills.name: Version Control Systems
skills.description: Tools for managing source code, tracking changes, and enabling team collaboration.
skills.notes: Git is essential. Learn branching, merging, pull requests, and platforms like GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.

skills.name: Networking & Protocols
skills.description: Understanding how systems communicate over networks using protocols and infrastructure components.
skills.notes: Includes HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, SSH, TCP/IP, OSI model, load balancers, proxies, and firewalls. Crucial for debugging distributed systems.

skills.name: Containers
skills.description: Packaging applications and dependencies into isolated, portable environments.
skills.notes: Learn Docker fundamentals, container lifecycle, images, volumes, and networking. Containers ensure consistency across environments.

skills.name: Container Orchestration
skills.description: Managing, scaling, and deploying containers across clusters of machines.
skills.notes: Kubernetes is the industry standard. Learn pods, deployments, services, scaling, and cluster management.

skills.name: Cloud Providers
skills.description: Platforms that provide infrastructure and services for deploying and scaling applications.
skills.notes: Includes AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud. Learn compute (EC2), storage (S3), networking, and managed services.

skills.name: CI/CD (Continuous Integration & Deployment)
skills.description: Automating the process of building, testing, and deploying applications.
skills.notes: Tools like GitHub Actions, Jenkins, and GitLab CI help automate pipelines, improve reliability, and speed up releases.

skills.name: Configuration Management
skills.description: Tools and practices for managing system configurations and automating infrastructure setup.
skills.notes: Includes Ansible, Chef, and Puppet. Helps ensure consistency and reproducibility across environments.

skills.name: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
skills.description: Defining and managing infrastructure using code instead of manual processes.
skills.notes: Tools like Terraform, CloudFormation, and Pulumi allow versioning and automation of infrastructure provisioning.

skills.name: Monitoring & Logging
skills.description: Tracking system performance, logs, and metrics to ensure reliability and quick issue resolution.
skills.notes: Includes Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, and Datadog. Learn observability, alerting, and debugging production systems.

skills.name: Security & Secrets Management
skills.description: Protecting infrastructure, managing secrets, and ensuring secure communication between services.
skills.notes: Includes Vault, secret management tools, encryption, IAM, and secure DevOps practices (DevSecOps).
